untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'two peaks at similar heights' pattern and 'large price rise preceding pattern' — these require multi-bar pattern recognition and relative peak identification not expressible with point-in-time indicators. Also requires 'industry peers declining' which is external cross-asset data unavailable in single-stock indicators.
translation_notes: Translated conservatively using neckline proxy (support level s1 breakbelow) and trend confirmation (ADX > 25 for established downtrend). Stop loss set to 8% based on stated failure_rate_5pct. Exit on mean reversion to sma_20. Market regime restricted to BEAR_MARKET and TRENDING_DOWN per signal specification. The core pattern detection logic cannot be fully captured without pattern-recognition capabilities.
